message:
chore(deps): Promote charmbracelet/x/ansi and sqlite3 to direct dependencies

Moves two dependencies from indirect to direct in go.mod as they are
now explicitly imported in the codebase:

1. github.com/charmbracelet/x/ansi v0.8.0
   - Previously: // indirect
   - Now: Direct import in dashboard and TUI components
   - Used for ANSI escape sequence handling in terminal output

2. github.com/mattn/go-sqlite3 v1.14.33
   - Previously: // indirect
   - Now: Direct import for local database operations
   - Used by beads (br/bd) integration and caching

These were already transitive dependencies through charmbracelet/bubbletea
and charmbracelet/lipgloss, but are now directly used in NTM code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
